buyer_id.description: Reference to a Buyer record. Null until a Buyer is created from the submission. Nullable.

company_name.description: Company name captured on the submission before a Buyer exists.

form_payload.description: JSON object holding the complete raw submission, including free text answers not promoted to Buyer fields, such as prior lead generation experience, that experience described, and additional requirements.

steps.description: JSON array of step objects. Each step has key, status (pending, running, complete, failed, skipped), attempts, error, external_id and completed_at. The external_id records what was already created on the remote system so a retry is safe.

current_step.description: Key of the step currently being processed. Nullable.

intro_email_scheduled_for.description: When the intro email is scheduled to send. Nullable.

submitted_at.description: When the submission was received. Nullable.
